speaker: left
name: Count Down
text: What is a Mallard? A miserable little pile of secrets!

speaker: left
name: Count Down
text: But enough talk... Have at you!

speaker: right
name: Goose
text: ..What the hell are you talking about?

speaker: left
name: Count Down
text: Wait.. you! What are [i]you[/i] still doing here?!

speaker: right
name: Goose
text: ..Because Euan didn't make a [shake rate=20 level=10]level[/shake] yet!

speaker: left
name: Count Down
text: That sounds like a [wave amp=50 freq=4]you problem[/wave] homie.

speaker: right
name: Goose
text: Ugh.. wait a second, why are your eyes red?
